title: Standardize congress session schema and migrate

log.context: Standardize congress session schema and migrate

Migration complete. Here is a summary of what was done:

**Schema Audit** found 6 distinct variations across 89 congress sessions (1-90):
- `status`: "done" vs "failed" vs "cancelled" (no "completed")
- `mode`: missing on 88/89 sessions
- `evolution`: stored as dict (early), JSON string (mid-late), or slug-keyed dict (session 71)
- `vote_summary`: stored as dict, string, or absent (extractable from round responses)
- `roster`: inconsistent key sets (some had `name`, `emoji`, `color`, `descriptio...(truncated)
